fields.label: Warehouse
fields.description: Target warehouse for this buffer rule. One row per warehouse.

fields.label: ADU
fields.description: F1: Average Daily Usage — rolling 90-day average of daily consumption (units/day). Export from Delivery Notes.

fields.label: RLT (days)
fields.description: F1: Replenishment Lead Time in days. FG=blend+pack+QC+move. RM=PO to GRN. Average last 10 cycles.

fields.label: Target Buffer
fields.description: F1: Auto-calculated = ADU × RLT × VF. This is the maximum buffer stock to hold.

fields.label: DAF
fields.description: F6: Demand Adjustment Factor. 1.0=normal. Diwali=1.6. Summer=0.7. Overrides global DAF if set.

fields.label: Adjusted Buffer
fields.description: F6: = Target Buffer × DAF. Used when DAF ≠ 1.0. This is the EFFECTIVE buffer size.

fields.label: Red Zone (< qty)
fields.description: Auto-calculated: Buffer × 33%. Stock below this = Red Zone = PRODUCE NOW.

fields.label: Yellow Zone (< qty)
fields.description: Auto-calculated: Buffer × 66%. Stock below this but above Red = Yellow Zone = plan replenishment.

fields.label: TMR Count
fields.description: F7: Consecutive Too-Much-Red increases. Safeguard blocks at max (default 3).

fields.label: Consecutive Green Days
fields.description: F8: Consecutive days in Green zone. TMG triggers at 3 × RLT days.

fields.label: Active
fields.description: Uncheck to temporarily disable this buffer rule without deleting it.
